privileged_info_summary: The costume damage assessment task is a medium-difficulty LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet task with a 180-second timeout and 15-step limit. The task operates on synthetically-generated data: a Master_Inventory sheet containing 30 costume items (Victorian, Edwardian, Medieval, Fantasy, 1920s, Renaissance, and Contemporary pieces) with properties including ID, type, era, size, condition, last use date, and rental value; and a Damage_Log sheet containing 8 damage report descriptions. The environment is based on ubuntu-gnome-systemd_highres with 4 CPU cores, 4 GB RAM, and a 1920x1080 display at 10 FPS.
